sessions.summary: Added authentication to 48 endpoints across 7 files (configuration + 6 audited files). Fixed health check dict returns, statistics query bug, and rate limiter bypass. All pre-commit hooks pass. GREEN: 1238 passed, 522 skipped, 0 failed.

sessions.title: Monolith Splits
tasks_completed: Refreshed dependency graph (833 nodes, 1568 edges, 7 critical hub files)
Mapped OrchestrationService (3,427 lines): 19 methods + 5 module-level functions grouped into 5 domains with production caller analysis
Mapped tool_accessor.py (1,072 lines): 45 methods across 9 domains — recommended NO SPLIT (facade pattern)
Assessed 22 files >500 lines — only orchestration_service.py is a genuine monolith
Found 8 functions >250 lines (vs 4 in original audit): 5 in orchestration_service, 3 in other files
Created MONOLITH_SPLIT_PLAN.md with 3-module split proposal, oversized function extraction plans, and 4-phase implementation order
deviations: Found 8 oversized functions instead of 4 referenced in H-16 — audit likely only checked a subset of files
tool_accessor.py recommended NO SPLIT — facade pattern is intentional and splitting would increase complexity
sessions.notes_for_next: Phase A+B executed (commit 6a356084). orchestration_service.py: 3,427 -> 2,705 lines. protocol_builder.py: 941 lines (new). All 5 oversized functions under 250 lines. Remaining split work: job_lifecycle extraction (Phase C, ~692 lines), other file decompositions (Phase D). 3 oversized functions in other files still need attention (see MONOLITH_SPLIT_PLAN.md). tool_accessor.py should NOT be split.
sessions.summary: Research + execution complete. Mapped orchestration_service.py (3,427 lines) and tool_accessor.py (1,072 lines). Executed Phase A: extracted protocol_builder.py (941 lines of stateless functions). Executed Phase B: decomposed 5 oversized functions via helper extraction. orchestration_service.py reduced from 3,427 to 2,705 lines. All functions under 250 lines. 1414 tests passing.

sessions.title: Frontend Cleanup
tasks_completed: 7A: Migrated 15 components from inline navigator.clipboard.writeText to shared useClipboard composable
7B: Reduced !important from 113 to 50 (71 removed, 62.8% reduction) — remaining 50 are legitimate Vuetify framework overrides in global styles
7C: Tokenized 20 hardcoded colors across 8 files to use Vuetify theme tokens (rgb(var(--v-theme-primary)), etc.)
7D: Verified only backend ref (agent_job in websocketEventRouter.js) is LIVE — not stale. No changes needed.
7E: Added 29 ARIA labels across 8 components (buttons, icons, images, inputs, toggles)

7F: Cleaned dead Pinia store state from 9 stores — removed isLoading/isOrgAdmin/isOrgOwner (user.js), currentTask/taskSummary/7 dead getters (tasks.js), organizations/selectedOrg/3 dead getters (agents.js), lastLoadedProject/dead computed (projectTabs.js), dead state in settings/products/projects/projectMessagesStore/projectStateStore
7G: Vite build passes with zero errors
deviations: 7D: Only 1 backend ref found (agent_job in websocketEventRouter.js) and it was verified as LIVE, not stale. Phase 0750f already removed the actual stale ref.
7F: Agent ran full test suite and confirmed 1 pre-existing test failure (agentJobsStore.spec.js counter bug) — unrelated to cleanup changes
sessions.notes_for_next: All 7 phases of the 0750 Code Quality Cleanup Sprint are complete. Frontend build passes. 40 files modified across components, views, and stores. Pre-existing test failures in agentJobsStore.spec.js and projectJobsStore.spec.js (references deleted store) remain.
sessions.summary: Frontend cleanup complete. Shared clipboard composable (15 components), !important reduction (113->50, 62.8%), 20 color tokenizations, 29 ARIA labels, dead Pinia state removed from 9 stores. Build passes.

chain_summary: 7-phase Code Quality Cleanup Sprint completed with final score 7.8/10 (baseline 6.6, midpoint 7.1, target 8.5). 24 of 65 baseline findings fully resolved, 7 partially resolved. Key achievements: 70 dict-return anti-patterns migrated to exceptions (services layer clean), 48 API endpoints hardened with auth, OrchestrationService split (3,427 to 2,705 lines + 941-line protocol_builder.py), ~1,460 lines dead code removed, frontend CSS !important reduced 63% (113 to 42), 29 ARIA labels added, useClipboard composable shared across 15 components. Test suite improved from 1,238 to 1,416 passing (fixture drift fix recovered 178 tests). Sprint fell short of 8.5 target due to tools-layer dict returns (37 remain), pytest-asyncio compatibility issue, and structural debt (CSRF disabled, broken statistics endpoints, dead ToolAccessor methods).
